en.name: Kakuro
en.desc: A crossword-style math puzzle! Fill empty cells with digits 1-9 so that the sum matches the clue. No digit can repeat in a single sum. Think Sudoku meets math!
en.description: Kakuro is the addictive mathematical puzzle that combines crossword-style grids with arithmetic challenges! Fill empty cells with digits 1-9 so that each horizontal and vertical 'word' adds up to the clue number. The catch? No digit can repeat within a single sum. This elegant constraint creates puzzles that exercise both your math skills and logical deduction abilities!
en.objectives: Fill all empty cells with digits 1-9 so that each horizontal and vertical entry sums to its clue number. No digit can repeat within any single entry. Use logic and math to deduce the unique solution!
en.howToPlay: Fill empty cells with digits 1-9. The numbers above/left indicate the sum of consecutive cells. Each digit can only appear once in each sum.

rules.controls: Click on an empty cell to select it, then type a digit 1-9. Each 'word' (continuous horizontal or vertical cells) must sum to its clue. No repeated digits within a word.
mechanics: Words must sum to clue numbers
No repeated digits in a word

tips: Learn common sum combinations (e.g., 4 cells summing to 10)
Look for sums with limited possibilities
Cross-reference between horizontal and vertical sums
Start with cells that appear in multiple sums

faq.question: What are the unique combinations I should know?
faq.answer: Some sums have only one combination: 3 in 2 cells = {1,2}, 4 in 2 cells = {1,3}, 17 in 2 cells = {8,9}, etc. Memorizing these 'forced' combinations speeds up solving significantly.

faq.question: How is this different from Sudoku?
faq.answer: Sudoku uses the same digits 1-9, but relies on row/column/box uniqueness. Kakuro uses sum constraints instead. Both require logical deduction, but Kakuro adds arithmetic reasoning.

faq.question: What's the best starting strategy?
faq.answer: Look for entries with limited combinations—small sums in few cells or large sums in many cells. These constrain possibilities and help you fill cells that then constrain other entries.

faq.question: Can a digit repeat in intersecting words?
faq.answer: Yes! A cell might contain '5' which appears in both a horizontal and vertical word. The no-repeat rule only applies within a single horizontal or vertical entry, not across different entries.

zh.name: 数和
zh.desc: 填字风格的数学谜题！用1-9数字填空，使总和与提示相符。同一求和中数字不能重复。数独与数学的完美结合！
zh.description: 数和是将填字式网格与算术挑战结合的令人上瘾的数学谜题！用1-9数字填充空单元格，使每个水平和垂直'词'加起来等于提示数字。关键在于？单个和中数字不能重复。这个优雅的约束创造了既锻炼数学技能又锻炼逻辑推理能力的谜题！
zh.objectives: 用1-9数字填充所有空单元格，使每个水平和垂直条目的总和等于其提示数字。任何单个条目中数字不能重复。使用逻辑和数学推断独特解决方案！
zh.howToPlay: 在空白格子填入1-9的数字。横向或纵向连续格子内的数字之和必须等于提示数字。同一组内不能有重复数字。

rules.controls: 点击空单元格选择它，然后输入1-9的数字。每个'词'（连续的水平或垂直单元格）的总和必须等于其提示。词内不能有重复的数字。
mechanics: 词的总和必须等于提示数字
每个谜题有独特解决方案
features: 数学+逻辑 - 双重挑战
独特解决方案 - 一个正确答案
各种大小 - 从简单到专家
填字风格 - 熟悉的格式

tips: 小格子数（和3、4）最容易解决
使用数独排除法与格子约束
追踪每个格子组中使用的数字
寻找只有一个可能解的唯一组合

faq.question: 我应该知道哪些独特组合？
faq.answer: 一些和只有一个组合：2格和为3 = {1,2}，2格和为4 = {1,3}，2格和为17 = {8,9}等。记住这些'强制'组合可以显著加快解决速度。

faq.question: 这与数独有什么不同？
faq.answer: 数独使用相同的数字1-9，但依赖于行/列/框的唯一性。数和使用和约束。两者都需要逻辑推理，但数和增加了算术推理。

faq.question: 最佳起始策略是什么？
faq.answer: 寻找组合有限的条目——少量格子的小和或大量格子的大和。这些约束可能性，帮助你填充单元格，然后约束其他条目。

faq.question: 数字可以在相交的词中重复吗？
faq.answer: 可以！一个单元格可能包含'5'，它同时出现在水平和垂直词中。不重复规则只适用于单个水平或垂直条目内，而不是跨不同条目。
